description:
# Description

A sweet animal treat crafted at the Spice Rack.

Feed to an animal to reduce animal feed consumption on the next 3 harvests.

### Contributor

Sunflower Land is a community game built by a hundreds of developers and artists across the globe.
Come join us on [Github](https://github.com/sunflower-land/sunflower-land)
name: Honey Treat
